description.shortDescription: Azure managed physical edge compute device
description.longDescription: Azure Stack Edge Pro 2 is an AI-enabled edge computing device with network data transfer capabilities. You can choose from the available configurations based on your business need.
attributes: Compact device optimized for edge and branch locations with flexible mounting options
Optional configurations available with hardware acceleration using NVIDIA A2 GPUs
Multiple memory and storage configurations available

description.shortDescription: Azure managed physical edge compute device
description.longDescription: Azure Stack Edge Pro is an AI-enabled edge computing device with network data transfer capabilities. The device is powered with NVIDIA T4 GPUs to provide accelerated AI inferencing at the edge. You can choose from the following configurations based upon your business need
attributes: 1U rack mount device with network data transfer capabilities
Hardware accelerated ML using NVIDIA T4 GPU

description.longDescription: Azure Stack Edge Pro R is an AI-enabled edge computing device with network data transfer capabilities. The device is powered with NVIDIA T4 GPUs to provide accelerated AI inferencing at the edge and comes in a ruggedized casing to work in harsh environments. You can choose from the available configurations as per your business requirement.
attributes: Portable, server class device with network data transfer capabilities
Hardware accelerated ML using NVIDIA T4 GPU
Specialized rugged casing tailored for harsh environments
